features.feature: 쿼리와 키-값 쌍 집합을 출력으로 매핑하는 함수
features.evidence: An attention function can be described as mapping a query and a set of key-value pairs to an output, where the query, keys, values, and output are all vectors.

features.feature: 출력은 값들의 가중합으로 계산되며, 가중치는 쿼리와 키의 호환성 함수로 계산됨
features.evidence: The output is computed as a weighted sum of the values, where the weight assigned to each value is computed by a compatibility function of the query with the corresponding key.
We call our particular attention 'Scaled Dot-Product Attention'.

features.feature: 쿼리와 모든 키의 닷프로덕트를 sqrt(dk)로 나누고 softmax를 적용해 값에 대한 가중치를 얻음
features.evidence: We compute the dot products of the query with all keys, divide each by sqrt(dk), and apply a softmax function to obtain the weights on the values.
